name: Blue Cheese Crab Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the crab meat, cheeses, and onions evenly over the prepared pie crust.
2. Whisk together the eggs, milk, and pepper in a bowl until combined.
3. Pour the egg mixture slowly into the crust, distributing it evenly.
4. Sprinkle the parmesan cheese on top of the quiche.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 35 minutes, or until the center is set.
6. Allow the quiche to cool for 5 minutes before serving.
